race.description: Ladbrokes Geelong Cup On Sale Now Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: ZORRO'S FLIGHT (4) resumes. He didn't fire last time in but is better than that with strong 3yo form over a touch further. This looks a nice race first up, expect him to prove hard to hold out. RUSSIAN DUCHESS (11) resumes. She's a lightly raced filly who has shown ability and can sprint well fresh with a handy 2kg claim for the in form apprentice. BREAK THE TABOO (13) worked home well into third when last seen at Seymour and won't need to improve much to be winning here, especially if they're coming wide in the straight late in the day. SACRED FORT (6) just found one better first up and has claims with natural improvement.
